nodes.name: storage.ts
nodes.summary: Defines localStorage key constants, default build state shape, save key mapping for compression, enchantment slot key mapping, and maximum build slots.

nodes.name: Storage Config
nodes.summary: Aggregate storage configuration constants: keys, maps, and limits for build persistence.

nodes.name: thresholds.ts
nodes.summary: Defines game mechanic threshold constants: armor pen branch threshold, CD minimum, and base crit damage percent.

nodes.name: Thresholds Config
nodes.summary: Game mechanic numerical thresholds used by the engine.

nodes.name: defense.ts
nodes.summary: Defense calculation module: resolves percent and flat defense sources into multipliers, computes damage type defense groupings, and calculates base armor defense percentage from stats.

nodes.name: calcDefMultiplier
nodes.summary: Calculates damage multiplier from a defense percentage using 1/(1+def) for positive and 1+|def| for negative.

nodes.name: calcTrueDrPercent
nodes.summary: Computes the true damage reduction percentage from a defense value.

nodes.name: resolveDefenseSources
nodes.summary: Resolves an array of DefenseSource objects into a DefenseBreakdown with percent/flat multipliers and final multiplier.

nodes.name: calcBaseArmorDefPct
nodes.summary: Sums relevant defense stats for a damage type based on the DEF_GROUP mapping.

nodes.name: EnchantSelect.svelte
nodes.summary: A searchable dropdown component for selecting enchantments, with color-coded options, keyboard navigation, scroll-aware positioning, and outside-click dismissal.

nodes.name: enchantTooltip.ts
nodes.summary: Generates formatted tooltip text for enchantments, pulling description, stat modifiers, effects, and additional notes from the engine data.

nodes.name: getEnchantTooltipText
nodes.summary: Returns a multi-line tooltip string for a given enchantment name, including description, stats, effects, and notes.

nodes.name: engine.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export file re-exporting all modules from engine/data, shrine, enchant, weapon, build, and format submodules.

nodes.name: engine
nodes.summary: Central engine barrel module aggregating data, shrine, enchant, weapon, build, and format functionality.

nodes.name: data.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel export file re-exporting character, equipment, and weapons data modules.

nodes.name: engine/data
nodes.summary: Barrel module for game data: character stats, equipment definitions, and weapon definitions.

nodes.name: Modal.svelte
nodes.summary: Reusable modal dialog component with overlay backdrop, focus trapping, auto-focus on first focusable element, close button, and global modal-item CSS classes for list items.

nodes.name: trapFocus
nodes.summary: Keyboard event handler that traps Tab/Shift+Tab focus within the modal dialog.

nodes.name: focusOnOpen
nodes.summary: Module-level Svelte action that auto-focuses the first focusable element inside the modal on open.

nodes.name: AccessorySelectModal.svelte
nodes.summary: Modal for selecting armor accessories (helmet, chestplate, leggings), rings, runes, and infusions, with search, filtering, effective boost calculation, and Brawny conversion display.

nodes.name: select
nodes.summary: Updates the build store with the selected item name and closes the modal.

nodes.name: getItemStats
nodes.summary: Retrieves stats for an armor part, ring, or rune item.

nodes.name: getItemPerk
nodes.summary: Retrieves the perk name and amount from an armor part or item.

nodes.name: computeItemEffectiveBoost
nodes.summary: Computes the effective boost percentage for an item based on weapon scalings.

nodes.name: computeItemBrawnyBoost
nodes.summary: Computes effective boost assuming Brawny perk converts non-physical boosts to physical.

nodes.name: getItemDesc
nodes.summary: Retrieves description text for an armor part or item.

nodes.name: GuildModal.svelte
nodes.summary: Modal for selecting a guild and rank, with search filtering by guild name or perk name, rank selection buttons, and stat/perk display.

nodes.name: modals/index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting RaceModal, GuildModal, AccessorySelectModal, and WeaponPartModal Svelte components.

nodes.name: modals
nodes.summary: Barrel module exporting all modal components.

nodes.name: RaceModal.svelte
nodes.summary: Modal for selecting a race, with search filtering, stat modifier display, and passive description.

nodes.name: WeaponPartModal.svelte
nodes.summary: Modal for selecting weapon parts (blade, handle, glove, essence) with search, tag filtering, tier/type filters, stat display, and perk listing.

nodes.name: select
nodes.summary: Updates the build store with the selected weapon part name and closes the modal.

nodes.name: StatFilterShared.svelte
nodes.summary: Shared stat filter chip component with include/exclude/dimmed states, plus a module-level buildStatMaps helper for creating label/color maps from stat groups.

nodes.name: buildStatMaps
nodes.summary: Builds label and color lookup maps from an array of stat group definitions.

nodes.name: elementalBoosts.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the StatDef interface and constant arrays for elemental boost stats (dexterity, physical, magic, fire, water, earth, air, hex, holy, summon) and their negative variants.

nodes.name: filterActions.ts
nodes.summary: Provides a createFilterActions factory for managing include/exclude filter maps with toggle, remove, clear, and keyboard handler functions.

nodes.name: createFilterActions
nodes.summary: Factory that creates toggle, remove, clear, and handleChipKeyDown functions for a FilterMap state.

nodes.name: toast.ts
nodes.summary: Svelte writable store for toast notifications with addToast and removeToast functions, supporting success/error/info/warning types and auto-dismiss.

nodes.name: addToast
nodes.summary: Adds a toast notification to the store with auto-dismiss timeout.

nodes.name: removeToast
nodes.summary: Removes a toast notification by ID from the store.

nodes.name: Toast.svelte
nodes.summary: Toast notification container component that subscribes to the toast store, renders animated toast items with type-specific icons/colors, and allows manual dismissal.

nodes.name: Badge.svelte
nodes.summary: Versatile badge/tag component with variant colors (green, amber, red, purple, blue, teal, muted, draco), sizes (xs/sm/md), square shape, solid fill, and monospace options.

nodes.name: Button.svelte
nodes.summary: Styled button component with variant colors (default, positive, negative, warning, info, neutral), sizes (sm/md/lg), active state, and disabled support.

nodes.name: Card.svelte
nodes.summary: Flexible card container component with variants (default, surface, ghost), hoverable behavior, accent color borders, configurable padding and gap, and click/keyboard handler.

nodes.name: Divider.svelte
nodes.summary: Horizontal rule divider component with color variants (green, amber, red, purple, blue, teal, draco) and spacing options.

nodes.name: ui/index.ts
nodes.summary: Barrel file re-exporting Card, Badge, Button, Stat, Section, Divider, and Panel UI components.

nodes.name: ui
nodes.summary: Barrel module for all UI components.

nodes.name: Panel.svelte
nodes.summary: Panel container component with gradient background, optional header snippet, color variants, and configurable padding.

nodes.name: Section.svelte
nodes.summary: Section container component with uppercase title header, color variants (green, amber, red, purple, blue, teal, draco), and configurable gap.
